headline: Regions Financial (RF) Expands Investment Banking Reach With Frazer Lanier Acquisition
summary: Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) has completed its acquisition of The Frazer Lanier Company. The deal expands Regions Financial's investment banking and municipal finance services for public and institutional clients. The transaction strengthens the resources of Regions Capital Markets and its corporate banking business. Regions Financial enters this new phase with its stock at $30.28 and multi-year returns that some investors may view as meaningful, including 27.0% over the past year and 88.9%...
